title: Layer 2 (Orchestrator v2) — observed judgment lock for ledger contention invariants
summary: Locks Layer 2 judgment against mechanically captured observed artifacts for ledger contention invariants (single-winner credit allocation + refund cap under contention) and validates evaluator determinism plus negative controls.

scenarios.scenario: Two concurrent credit applications contend against the same available credit.
scenarios.expected_behavior: Single winner; loser fails with expected insufficient-available error; no over-application.
scenarios.verification_method: Observed soak artifacts + Layer2 judgment; see Appendix A evidence doc.

scenarios.scenario: Layer 2 evaluator is deterministic on identical artifacts (replay-safe judgment).
scenarios.expected_behavior: Same observed bundle evaluated twice yields identical machine-checkable judgment JSON.
scenarios.verification_method: Determinism assertion is proven by stored judgment outputs referenced by EV-2026-04-08_layer2_orchestrator-v2_observed_judgment.md.

scenarios.scenario: Illegally scoped allocations/applications are rejected by invariants and constraint-breaker tests.
scenarios.verification_method: Full deck contains explicit constraint-break attempts and invariants.

scenarios.scenario: Environment failure is classified as caution (no correctness signal).
scenarios.expected_behavior: DEPLOY_CAUTION + environment_fix when artifacts incomplete / DB connectivity fails.
scenarios.verification_method: Evaluator run against golden environment-failure bundle.

scenarios.scenario: An invariant violation is correctly blocked by the evaluator (do not deploy).
scenarios.verification_method: Evaluator run against golden invariant-violation bundle.

concurrency_model.lock_strategy: Reserve idempotency -> lock funding object (payment/credit memo) FOR UPDATE -> lock invoices ORDER BY invoice_record_id FOR UPDATE -> lock dependent ledger rows last; enforce caps at write time.
guarantees: Contention paths are executed under row locks; single-winner outcomes are enforced by write-time caps and invariant checks.
non_guarantees: This is local/CI-like proof; production infra differences still require production validation before claiming PRODUCTION-VALIDATED.

ops_impact.task_dedupe_rule: global idempotency key registry + unique constraints

derivation_inputs: Local DB-backed race + soak runs (ApplyCredit contention + Refund contention).
Orchestrator v2 evaluator applied to observed success + negative controls.

artifacts.label: Layer 2 pipeline summary log
artifacts.proof_of: Human-readable log with run_id and pointers to observed bundle + verdict

artifacts.label: DB/output pointer index
artifacts.proof_of: Run-scoped pointer list for observed bundle + judgments

artifacts.label: Run manifest
artifacts.proof_of: Run-scoped metadata with run_id and observed bundle root

artifacts.label: Observed Layer 2 judgment (machine-checkable)
artifacts.proof_of: Judgment JSON that can be validated/replayed without rerunning tests

artifacts.label: Layer 2 evaluator pipeline
artifacts.proof_of: Single evaluator used for observed + negative controls

uncertainty_boundaries: Observed bundle is local artifact capture, not production validation.
A minimal observed-bundle subset is copied into artifacts/runs/<run_id>/observed_bundle (self-contained gate evidence).

findings.title: Layer 2 lock is local-proof only (not production validated)
findings.business_impact: Prevents promotion of local correctness evidence into a production-safe claim without an explicit production validation run.
findings.recommended_action: Run a production-targeted validation lane before setting readiness label to P0-02: PRODUCTION-VALIDATED.
findings.verification_method: Confirm readiness.labels remains LOCAL_PROVEN and does not claim production validation.

verification.idempotency_analysis: Idempotency + replay semantics are evidenced via Layer 2 determinism (same artifacts => identical judgment) and the underlying idempotency registry in the ledger test suite.
verification.replay_test: Golden environment failure + invariant violation bundles + observed success bundle are all evaluated through the same evaluator pipeline.
verification.rollback_plan: If any ledger invariants regress, revert to previous known-good schema/services and rerun Layer 1+2 pipelines before redeploy.
